title: Glossary Entry
description: Single canonical term definition. Used in patent glossaries and reusable in marketing/legal glossaries with the same shape. The glossary builder consumes a list of these and renders them into sectioned tables.

term.description: The term as it appears in the glossary heading column (e.g., 'SBPA', 'ProvenanceField', 'voxel_id').

expansion.description: Acronym expansion if applicable. Use null (not empty string) when the term is not an acronym; the renderer prints '—' for null.

definition.description: The locked definition text. Must match verbatim wherever the term is defined in patent specs.

status.description: LOCKED = definition fixed, used in filings as-is. PATENT-OWNED = defined here; upstream catalog defers to this glossary. PENDING = inventor approval required before use in any spec. DEPRECATED = historical; retained for cross-reference only.

source.description: Provenance string in the form 'SourceID YYYY-MM-DD · STATUS' (e.g., 'LUHTECH-IP-ARCH-2026-03-10 + Erik 2026-05-05 · LOCKED'). The rightmost token after '·' must mirror the status field.

section.description: Glossary section letter and title (e.g., 'A. Cluster and Portfolio Identifiers', 'B. Data Structures and Provenance').

patentOwnedBy.description: If status is PATENT-OWNED, the provisional that primarily owns this term. Used by the cross-reference builder.

appearsInProvisionals.description: Provisionals whose specs reference this term. Maintained by the spec builder; used to enforce cross-spec definition consistency.

deprecatedBy.description: If status is DEPRECATED, the term that replaces this one (e.g., 'CTA' has deprecatedBy='SBPA').
